:::RJSCPXLLA7_TEST_SUITE_5:::Repository Route tests › :::RJSCPXLLA7_TEST_84:::When the Repository Route is opened initially and the username in the Home Route is empty, then the page should consist of an HTML paragraph element with text content as \"GitHub username is empty, please provide a valid username for Repositories\":::5:::\n\n TestingLibraryElementError: Unable to find an element with the text: /GitHub username is empty, please provide a valid username for Repositories/i. This could be because the text is broken up by multiple elements. In this case, you can provide a function for your text matcher to make your matcher more flexible.\n\n \u001b[36m<body>\u001b[39m\n \u001b[36m<div>\u001b[39m\n \u001b[36m<div\u001b[39m\n \u001b[33mclass\u001b[39m=\u001b[32m\"notfound-container\"\u001b[39m\n \u001b[36m>\u001b[39m\n \u001b[36m<img\u001b[39m\n \u001b[33malt\u001b[39m=\u001b[32m\"page not found\"\u001b[39m\n \u001b[33mclass\u001b[39m=\u001b[32m\"notfound-image\"\u001b[39m\n \u001b[33msrc\u001b[39m=\u001b[32m\"https://res.cloudinary.com/dqtskutwx/image/upload/v1755624833/Group_7519_n18k4a.png\"\u001b[39m\n \u001b[36m/>\u001b[39m\n \u001b[36m<h1\u001b[39m\n \u001b[33mclass\u001b[39m=\u001b[32m\"notfound-heading\"\u001b[39m\n \u001b[36m>\u001b[39m\n \u001b[0mPAGE NOT FOUND\u001b[0m\n \u001b[36m</h1>\u001b[39m\n \u001b[36m<p\u001b[39m\n \u001b[33mclass\u001b[39m=\u001b[32m\"notfound-description\"\u001b[39m\n \u001b[36m>\u001b[39m\n \u001b[0mwe are sorry, the page you requested could not be found Please go back to the homepage.\u001b[0m\n \u001b[36m</p>\u001b[39m\n \u001b[36m<a\u001b[39m\n \u001b[33mhref\u001b[39m=\u001b[32m\"/\"\u001b[39m\n \u001b[36m>\u001b[39m\n \u001b[36m<button\u001b[39m\n \u001b[33mclass\u001b[39m=\u001b[32m\"go-to-home-button\"\u001b[39m\n \u001b[33mtype\u001b[39m=\u001b[32m\"button\"\u001b[39m\n \u001b[36m>\u001b[39m\n \u001b[0mGo to Home\u001b[0m\n \u001b[36m</button>\u001b[39m\n \u001b[36m</a>\u001b[39m\n \u001b[36m</div>\u001b[39m\n \u001b[36m</div>\u001b[39m\n \u001b[36m</body>\u001b[39m\n\n 502 | it(':::RJSCPXLLA7_TEST_84:::When the Repository Route is opened initially and the username in the Home Route is empty, then the page should consist of an HTML paragraph element with text content as \"GitHub username is empty, please provide a valid username for Repositories\":::5:::', async () => {\n 503 | renderWithBrowserRouter(<App />, {route: repositoryRoutePath})\n > 504 | const paragraphEl = screen.getByText(\n | ^\n 505 | new RegExp(\n 506 | /GitHub username is empty, please provide a valid username for Repositories/i,\n 507 | ),\n\n at Object.getElementError :::RJSCPXLLA7_TEST_SUITE_5:::Repository Route tests › :::RJSCPXLLA7_TEST_87:::When the HTTP GET request in the Home Route is successful and the Repositories Route is opened, then an HTTP GET request should be made to the GitHub User Repository Details API URL with path parameter as the username provided search input of the Home Route:::10:::\n\n Unable to find role=\"img\"\n\n
